blocks.text: The runtime creates one session for a browser reading context and keeps active page data outside the Side Panel state.
Clients call the sessions endpoint before streaming chat turns so every event can reference a session id.
The chat stream uses server sent events and emits state, intent, budget, tool, artifact, response, and error events.

text:
The runtime creates one session for a browser reading context and keeps active page data outside the Side Panel state.
Clients call the sessions endpoint before streaming chat turns so every event can reference a session id.
The chat stream uses server sent events and emits state, intent, budget, tool, artifact, response, and error events.
title: docs
